name: Docker

description: Inject environment variables into services in your Docker Compose file.

description: Fetch secrets in your Jenkins pipelines.

name: Packer

name: AWS Amplify
description: Access secrets at AWS Amplify build time.

name: GitHub Actions

name: Kubernetes CSI

name: Backstage
